subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #079 The Reality of the World of Being
subcodes.first_line: The sophists hold that all existence is illusory, indeed, that each and every being is an absolute illusion
subcodes.first_line_orig: طائفهء سوفسطائیه بر آنند که موجودات عبارت از اوهامات است هر موجود وهم محض است
subcodes.subjects: @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @life and death
